name: Red Lentil Soup-1
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Beef Stock or Chicken Stock
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large soup pot, heat oil over medium heat. Add onions and sauté until soft.
2. Add lentils and stir to combine with the onions.
3. Cook for several minutes until the lentils are well-cooked.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (stock, paprika, bay leaf, salt, pepper, dried mint, and dried parsley).
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer until the lentils are very soft, about 35 minutes.
6. The soup may be pureed if desired before serving.
